source_pr.title: topsql: fix race in test
source_pr.body:
Signed-off-by: mornyx <mornyx.z@gmail.com>

Issue Number: close #31713

### Release note

<!-- bugfix or new feature needs a release note -->

```release-note
None
```

root_cause_explanation: The flakiness was caused by unsynchronized shared state in an async test: a background collector callback merges into a shared map while the test thread reads/asserts on it, triggering data races under concurrency. This PR stabilizes the test by protecting the shared map with a mutex in both the callback and assertions.
fix_pattern: Synchronize shared state accessed by background goroutines in tests (e.g., mutex around shared map/slice).

evidence: evidence: topsql: fix race in test
